No Poverty.reason: The course focuses on microeconomic theory and profit maximization, with no explicit mention of poverty eradication, social protection, or pro-poor strategies. The connection is too indirect to warrant a higher score.

Good Health and Well-being.reason: The course syllabus contains no explicit or implicit references to health, well-being, disease prevention, or healthcare services.

equip students with a discipline that analyzes issues and problems
